finding: Runner-sync admission can self-block because broker runner-sync enqueue creates .atm/runtime/runner-sync-steward-queue.json, but assert-runner-sync-admission classifies that required queue-head file as foreign non-release WIP.
expectedBehavior: A queue-head runner-sync reservation should be admitted without treating its own runtime queue file as foreign WIP; ordinary unrelated non-release WIP should still block release publication.
evidenceOrRepro: During TASK-RFT-0077 closeback, `node atm.mjs broker runner-sync enqueue --task TASK-RFT-0077 --actor codex-task-rft-0077 --sealed-source-sha 69612b61534cecfc1c861721e81013d4c2968bf0 --surface release/atm-onefile/atm.mjs --surface release/atm-root-drop --json` succeeded, then `ATM_RETAIN_RELEASE_ARTIFACTS=1 npm run build` failed with `ATM_RUNNER_SYNC_FOREIGN_WIP_BLOCKED` for `.atm/runtime/runner-sync-steward-queue.json`.
followUp: Open a governed fix card to teach runner-sync admission to exempt the matching queue-head runtime queue file, add a regression test for enqueue-then-build admission, and document the closeback order for delivery commit plus runner sync.
